exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph LR
    subgraph On-Premises
        A[User Request] --> B[API Gateway]
    end
    subgraph Kubernetes Orchestration
        B --> C[Kubernetes Cluster]
        C --> D[Deployment: Azure Functions]
        C --> E[Deployment: GCP BigQuery]
        C --> F[Deployment: AWS S3]
    end
    subgraph Azure Cloud
        D --> G[Azure Functions: Compute]
    end
    subgraph GCP Cloud
        E --> H[GCP BigQuery: Analytics]
    end
    subgraph AWS Cloud
        F --> I[AWS S3: Storage]
    end
    G --> I
    H --> I
    I --> H
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style B fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style C fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style D fill:#87CEEB,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style E fill:#87CEEB,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style F fill:#87CEEB,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style G fill:#ADD8E6,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style H fill:#ADD8E6,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style I fill:#ADD8E6,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
